verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hear the cries of the shackled From the onset of time For the chains of defeat there's no key. See the tears of the broken, The cries of the slaves Is there no one worthy to set us free? Then the crying is stilled As the chörus rings out. The shackled released from their chains, And thousands of voices Are swelling the song, Worthy the lamb that was slain.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Worthy, Worthy, Worthy the Lamb that was slain. Worthy, Worthy, Worthy the Lamb that was slain.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Then all the archangels The saints of all time Holding their crowns in their hands Fall down before Him joining the song Worthy, Worthy the Lamb

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Praise Him, praise Him, Praise the Lamb that was slain. Praise Him, praise Him, Praise the Lamb that was slain.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Love Him, love Him, Love the Lamb that was slain. Love Him, love Him, Love the Lamb that was slain.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Serve Him, serve Him, Serve the Lamb that was slain. Serve Him, serve Him, Serve the Lamb that was slain.
